objective: Testare apprendimento su storico asset + news/fondamentali + multiverse thesis, 3 cicli, senza dati futuri.
plateau_reason: No material improvement for 2 cycle(s): min pnl delta 750, min pass delta 0.0025.

learned_rules: baseline: price + history + news + catalyst + risk, no future data
baseline: price + history + news + catalyst + risk, no future data
missed valid opportunities: trust history/catalyst more and lower confidence gate slightly
commodity missed opportunities: allow catalyst/flow-confirmed commodity entries without lowering global risk gates
quiet compounder missed opportunities: reward low-risk high-history assets even without loud news
